Package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

    • Method Detail

      • withContents

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withContents​(List<Content> contents)
        Input only. Immutable. The content to cache.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withTools

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withTools​(List<Tool> tools)
        Input only. Immutable. A list of Tools the model may use to generate the next response.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withCreateTime

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withCreateTime​(String createTime)
        Output only. Creation time of the cache entry.

        A timestamp in RFC3339 UTC "Zulu" format, with nanosecond resolution and up to nine fractional digits. Examples: "2014-10-02T15:01:23Z" and "2014-10-02T15:01:23.045123456Z".

        Returns:
        this.

      • withUpdateTime

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withUpdateTime​(String updateTime)
        Output only. When the cache entry was last updated in UTC time.

        A timestamp in RFC3339 UTC "Zulu" format, with nanosecond resolution and up to nine fractional digits. Examples: "2014-10-02T15:01:23Z" and "2014-10-02T15:01:23.045123456Z".

        Returns:
        this.

      • withUsageMetadata

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withUsageMetadata​(UsageMetadata usageMetadata)
        Output only. Metadata on the usage of the cached content.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withExpireTime

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withExpireTime​(String expireTime)
        Timestamp in UTC of when this resource is considered expired. This is always provided on output, regardless of what was sent on input.

        A timestamp in RFC3339 UTC "Zulu" format, with nanosecond resolution and up to nine fractional digits. Examples: "2014-10-02T15:01:23Z" and "2014-10-02T15:01:23.045123456Z".

        Returns:
        this.

      • withTtl

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withTtl​(String ttl)
        Input only. New TTL for this resource, input only.

        A duration in seconds with up to nine fractional digits, ending with 's'. Example: "3.5s".

        Returns:
        this.

      • withName

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withName​(String name)
        Optional. Identifier. The resource name referring to the cached content. Format: `cachedContents/{id}`
        Returns:
        this.

      • withDisplayName

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withDisplayName​(String displayName)
        Optional. Immutable. The user-generated meaningful display name of the cached content. Maximum 128 Unicode characters.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withModel

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withModel​(String model)
        Required. Immutable. The name of the Model to use for cached content Format: `models/{model}`
        Returns:
        this.

      • withSystemInstruction

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withSystemInstruction​(Content systemInstruction)
        Optional. Input only. Immutable. Developer set system instruction. Currently text only.
        Returns:
        this.

      • withToolConfig

        public CachedContent.CachedContentBuilder withToolConfig​(ToolConfig toolConfig)
        Optional. Input only. Immutable. Tool config. This config is shared for all tools.
        Returns:
        this.

      • build

        public CachedContent build()

      • toString

        Overrides:
        toString in class Object
